author: @ProjectCambrian
text:
@CultureCasino 
a Thought Occurs!!
I DO think its True.
Its been made Immensely Clear that this Whole Thing Rests on RDJ...and Disney BEGGED Him to BEAR that to MAYBE SAVE MARVEL and SAVE DISNEY by extension.
That gives RDJ a WEE Bit MORE than just a Little LATITUDE, that Gives Him A LOT of POWER Because of the WEIGHT he's been Asked to and PAID a TON of Money to Bear.
So its RDJ thats ON the LINE and NOT Just MARVEL or Feige or Iger or Disney at Large.
So if he IS Saying SCRAP IT, START OVER with BETTER WRITERS, then THAT'S EXACTLY WHAT He's going to Get.
And i don't think I've EVER Heard of RDJ Threatening to Walk Off and Quit a Job before so there OBVIOUSLY Has to be a BUNCH of REALLY Important things that Are Inherently WRONG with what's happening.
From all I've Heard since the first IRONMAN is that He's a Gung Ho All For tge Job, getting it Done but Also making Sure that the Work Environment is a Positive One regardless of Stress and Pressures, this way Easing those factors and ending with a Positive Work Experience for Everyone involved.
Hands IN and NOT Hands ON.
Until NOW.
Everything they've Riffed On Source Materials wise has been Mostly In Name Only and Everything Post Endgame has been drawn from the Disney Ownership Era of Marvel Comics, so Everything After the 2009 acquisition where the Nefarious Disney Influences began to show almost Immediately. 
Ms Marvel being THEE PRIME EXAMPLE of FAILURE in Both Media Formats that Disney Refuses to Acknowledge pr Accept as UNMARKETABLE as Well as BRAND DAMAGING as Well as DRIVING AWAY the TARGET AUDIENCE, which are and Always have been BOYS and MEN.
HETERO Boys and Men ARE the Target Audience for Marvel, DC, Star Wars etc etc etc.
Yes there are Female Fans and Fans from All Sorts of Demographics....But ALL of Those COMBINED Cannot FINANCIALLY SUPPORT these Brands because in Business Terms and Perspectives, well by Proper Practices anyways, Those Demographics are NICHE, SMALL SCALE BUSINESS NICHE...NOT a BILLION DOLLAR COMPANY Want or Desire as the RETURNS are NEGLIGIBLE and Like Stooping to Pick Up PENNIES when in the Same Span of time to Pick them up, the person has made THOUSANDS MORE in Investments or Wages.
Example, After what EARNING a 100k a Year AFTER TAXES...yeah, one Doesn't THINK About MONEY As Much and is More likely to be OBLIVIOUS to Coins or even a few Bills dropped when they can Technically Afford to Do Anything they Want, Small Change means NOTHING to them.
The Ideological Battle and its Inconsistencies in Facts, Dependent upon Emotional Reactions to Validate the BS, this DELUSIONAL behavior and Thinking HAS YET to be EXCISED from the Company.
Disney is in SUCH ROUGH SHAPE that TALENT is AVOIDING THEM as Much as Possible. Im Sure of Disney had Offered RDJ essentially his Previous Paycheck Plus a BIT, he would have REJECTED IT, like Hawkeye Rejected a SMALLER PAYCHECK for a Second Season of HIS OWN SHOW...One of the OG Avengers for crying out loud and He WISELY turned it down.
This Duology or Trilogy, whichever it Turns out to be...its Gonna FAIL.
Because it INCLUDES ALL the FAILURES as IF they're AS GOOD As the MAINS.
You've got what HALF of the Cast for these movies being given essentially Another Shot at the END of this Era as IF they EARNED it...they HAVEN'T EARNED IT.
They SHOULD NOT EVEN BE IN IT. If ANYTHING, RECAST those Characters and use them as VARIANTS so the BAD TASTE of in Some Cases was thanks to Arrogant Actors, tye Rest simply because the Work they did was apart of BAD Movies and shows and Fans DON'T WANT TO BE REMINDED of Those BAD Movies and Shows!!
Recast SHE HULK and Voila, the CHARACTER Gets the SECOND CHANCE and Nobody is Thinking about the TWERKING Incident or the EMASCULATION of DAREDEVIL.
The Character of She Hulk gets a CLEAN SLATE and the New Actress would have That Same Clean Slate to work from.
Point Being, THOSE THAT FAILED...The LOSERS, They DON'T GET to GO to The CHAMPIONSHIP GAMES.
They're OUT, ELIMINATED and DISQUALIFIED.
And FANS DON'T WANT TO SEE The FAILED ACTORS Again.
They're NOT WILLING to PAY TO SEE the FAILURES Or the ACTIVISTS who ABUSED the FANS.
They've NEVER APOLOGIZED to the Audience. NOT ONCE.
And THAT'S REPUGNANT To the AUDIENCE as Its IMMATURE, IRRESPONSIBLE and ARROGANT to NOT TAKE ACCOUNTABILITY for Ones Actions that HARM Something or Someone.
And they DID HARM a LOT of THINGS (IP) and they DID ABUSE a LOT of FANS.
And in Some spots They STILL ARE.
To GET OUR TIME and OUR MONEY...the ONUS is On THEM to MAKE IT WORTH Our TIME and OUR MONEY.
Because its OUR SPARE TIME and OUR SPARE MONEY we are Spending.
And We ALL can CHOOSE to SPEND IT on WHATEVER ACTUALLY SATISFIES, MEETS Our WANTS and NEEDS for OUR ENTERTAINMENT as NOBODY, Not a SINGLE PERSON is OBLIGATED to SUPPORT a Company or BRAND that OPENLY BETRAYS THEM And the Very BRANDS...well CHARACTERS  and STORIES that We Hold Dear.
I think i can say with some Probabale Accuracy that whichever DOOM Story with the Multiverse they're going with, is Probably God Emperor Doom storyline or the more recent One World Under Doom.
Either are Serviceable considering the Corner they've Painted themselves into, but Both are Longer Form Stories better Suited for an Animated Show to Do either Justice.
The Secret Wars with God Emperor Doom is the Better of the Two, but looks like its a Story so far thats just a Different Version of the Secret Wars one.
Both within the Disney Era since 2009.
The Secret Wars would be my Choice to adapt, but Marvel kinda GUTS all its Source Materials to Replace it with Garbage so ive No Faith.
We shall See what transpires...but i think Disney may have placed TOO MUCH WEIGHT of "Responsibility for Success" on RDJ and for All thats being Wagered here...the Odds lf him Still WALKING are HIGH in my estimation.
Plausible at least. 
And Filming a bunch of Action Scenes Just Because and Then Writing the Story Around that...DUMB!!
that Means you Have to MENTAL GYMNASTICS your way yo Make the Story Validate the Action scenes...when its the Actuon Scene that ARE SHAPED BY the STORY.
When done BACKWARDS like They're Doing...NOBODY CARES Because they're NOT INVESTED as the GYMNASTICS Scenarios are UNNATURAL and IMMERSION BREAKING.
The STORY EARNS AUDIENCE INVESTMENT in PROTAGONISTS and ANTAGONISTS...and in this Genre's Case Each have HISTORIES Behind them that SHOULD DICTATE How they ACT when they Encounter each other.
Take Deadpool and Wolverine...its been 24 YEARS Since TYLER MANE/ SABERTOOTH was on screen and Instead of THAT ACTOR and THAT Version of the Character Getting the OWED TO HIM FIGHT with Wolverine...they Played it for LAUGHS and Lopped his Head Off in ONE MOVE.
Like...WTF?!!
I laughed in theaters but at the same moment was LET DONE.
Sure the OTHER SABERTOOTH got All the Best Action...but Going to the TROUBLE to GET TYLER MANE Back and Zip...a Few SECONDS of Screen time and Done.
DECADES of the RIVALRY between the two characters, a BATMAN Vs the JOKER LEVEL Rivalry...Payed Off for LAUGHS because the WRITERS ACTUALLY DON'T GET IT.
They've just Used a Few Noted BITS here and There but Otherwise they Use whatever Figures from the Toybox they're Allowed to and Loosely have them Mirror theyre Comics OG selves.
Fine for the Normies, but a HUGE LET DOWN for the FANS who Looked forward to that Possible Fight.
Its just....its MOSTLY BEEN a LET DOWN, Elseworlds amd What IF Takes on the original stories in a manner that actually DEMEANS thise stories and Characters and Future Potential and Viability.

I think they NEED the likes of CHRIS CLAREMONT to Write Them OUT of the Hole they're in.
If not theyre staying in that hole and will be BURIED there.

replies.author: @CultureCasino
replies.text:
WOW... My friend, you wrote a script for an entire video there. And as usual, you are right. No one wants to see the failures, unless they all spectacularly get eliminated. That would be a proper apology in and of itself. 

As far as the way scenes are developed under Feige, it's been that way for a while. Describe for the effects house what you want in a scene and writing a script around that is awful and ineffective as most pronounced is the recent Captain Anti America movie that flopped. This is no better than that and potentially worse.

Please make a video out of your response because it certainly is on the money. I am going to share your response with Loki and others in the sphere.

Thank you!

author: @solidmage1720
text: They should start the story of RDJ’s Tony Stark Iron Man from another universe and Terrence Howard is War Machine. They would be the link between the 1998-2007 pre-MCU and the current MCU. This Would be the invincible Iron Man and he sees 2005 Fantastic Four, Eric Bana’s Hulk, 2000’s X-Men, Tobey Maguire’s Spider-Man, Ben Affleck’s Daredevil, Nicholas Cage’s Ghost Rider, Wesley Snipes Blade, and Thomas Jane’s Punisher and Jennifer Garner’s Elektra are with David Hasselhoff’s Nick Fury. They find Tony Stark and they find out about Dr Doom taking over the world and he steals Tony Stark’s technology. They find out about the multiverse with Dr Strange from the current universe explaining. The multiverse won’t play a huge role but will be a behind the scenes concept. The pre-MCU 1998-2007 will help the current MCU fight Dr Doom and Galactus. Just follow the Crash (2004) plot concept where characters intertwine, Avengers Endgame and MK vs DC where it shows each character either main or minor for 10, 20 or 30 minutes a scene. They need to fight in Daily Bugle, X-mansion, Baxter Building, Stark industries, grand central station, sewers, Empire university, avengers mansions, bridges, alleyways, etc.

text: Lady here.  Having a female led movie does not mean I'm automatically sold on it. I'm more interested in a good story over anything, but I generally prefer to see a male lead in an action movie than a female. It's more believable, and, shocker, most women like hot men. The are some great action movies with women leads/co-leads, but those films were done in an era with excellent writers. I just don't see us getting another one any time soon.

author: @title4445
text: I honestly don’t understand how Marvel has writing issues.  It’s literally the easiest type of movie to write.  Comic books have always had series runs that conclude with a massive conclusion story that often results in a reset.  All they have to do is write the conclusion movie based on whatever run you’d like to adapt. Once you get that done , you know which characters need to be established (the movies you need to baseline your who/why) so that the end payoff makes sense.  You write backwards.  Disney is clueless because not only are they not writing for a continuity, they’re not writing at all.  It’s just winging it nonsense.  They have no idea what they’re doing

text: It will all be true, too many people involved not to be. Deadpool is completely out of place in a big team up movie, works as standalone or duo (bring back Cable).  If Renolds mob take over writing, Deadpool will be more front and centre, in a RDJ focused movie, it's not doing to work. If they reduce RDJ, then you are going to have to focus on the deadwood post Endgame and Disney minus characters which will ensure to movie opens well and then will dive, Marvels style, as people have seen the bait n switch before. In short it is going to be Marvels Doomsday; it's going to be glorious.

author: @superomegaprimemk2
text:
I wouldn't be surprised if they scrap the script, this movie was Doomed from the get go because they had nothing to build off from the start, where are the Avengers, oh wait, they are dead, retired or generally disbanded because there is no real reason for them to hang out together or work together as none of them are truly friends, Strange would of gone back to London to carry on learning magic along with Wung, the Hulk should really be on the run from the miltray as that never been resolved and there is little reason for the snap to prevent that from happening, Thor went back to space along with Captain Marvel, the Etrentals didn't show up for the battle against Thanos, same with Shung Chi, so there has been nothing of note since End Game, no story, no direction, this mess, is Disney's own fault, Kang, if they not relied upon a single actor, could of easily been replaced as a villan but the core problem remains, there are no Avengers to follow outside of Thor, Black Panther could of had another actor step into the role instead of shoehorning the sister into the role, so effectively, this movie, is icronically, DOOMED and not because of Doctor Doom, but because they failed to plan out phase 4, sorry, but I cannot acknowledge the existance of 5 & 6, where there hasn't been any event movie that screams event and the conclusion of a phase!

Audiences made it, loud and clear with Antman 3, they do not want the stupidy and it was cemented loud and clear with the failure of the Marvels, then to add to the pressure, audiences didn't show up for Not Captain America, they didn't come to Thunderdolts and they gave the middle finger to F4 because they have lost faith and interst in everything produced by Marvel outside of Ryan with Deadpool and I expect Spiderman to suffer when it comes out next year because its still connected to the MCU and I think Sony would be better off, taking Spiderman away from Kevin Fiege and his lackies and going back to stand alone Spiderman films with a complete reset, leave Tom Holand out!, what I seen of his Spiderman, has been a rather unwheming, I just can't be bothered to watch the two sequels to his Spiderman as he not been a very intersting character with that actor!
